title: cleanup: remove dead apps from APPS.md
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the garden
gist.blurb: We've pruned some dead links from the community app showcase to keep everything fresh and working perfectly.
gist.summary: Cleaned up the community apps list by removing inactive projects and fixing broken links.
gist.impact: The community app showcase is now fully up-to-date, ensuring all featured projects are active and accessible.
gist.visual_concept: A garden cleanup theme. Polly the bee wearing a gardener's hat, sweeping up dead leaves (representing dead links), while the Nomnom creature eats the debris to keep the garden tidy.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, sweeping up dead pixelated leaves, while the round tan nomnom creature happily eats broken link icons. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, sweeping up dead pixelated leaves, while the round tan nomnom creature happily eats broken link icons.
